content:
Let's say bizarro wants my hotkey settings, I can send you a file so you can import it to your computer instead of taking the time to manually enter it. It would be great if you could switch between configurations. For example, if I don't want to use my mouse side buttons, I could have a drop down section where you save configurations and I could choose keyboard only.


For Evadus+, in integrate AI, you should add an auto text that always says, “Answer this question.” This way, you won’t have to manually type it while you’re being recorded. (Unless it automatically knows you’re trying to answer the question)
